---
title: "Exploring Biological Networks with R"
author: "Jagajjit"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output:
  bookdown::gitbook
---

# {-}

![](BioNetR_Ignite_files/figure-html/CoverNet.jpeg){width=100%}


```{r cover_footer, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat('

<br>

<img src="BioNetR_Ignite_files/figure-html/BN2_logo.jpg" height="30" align="left">

<p align="center" style="font-size:12px; color:#666;">
© BNsquare, GyanArras Academy
</p>

<img src="BioNetR_Ignite_files/figure-html/GyanArrasLogo.png" height="30" align="right">

<br><br>
')
```
\newpage

# Preface {-}

This book introduces biological network analysis using R.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
